title: StetsonRock PvP Texture Pack
description: Adds a few things, like low fire, low shield, and smaller utils. :D
body:
_Simple **QOL** changes._

**Rain & Snow**:
  - All rain/snow sound removed, additionally all rain/snow particles are removed.

**PvP**:
  - No on-screen fire
  - No on-screen fishing bobber
  - No explosion Particles
  - Smaller Utilities
    - Buckets, Gaps, Pearls, Shields, Food
